Nightshade Scented Staff  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 12 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +11 MANA: +55
Effect: Scent of Darkness (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 8.0) at Level 50
WT: 4.4 Size: LARGE
Class: NEC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

"What do you want to be when you grow up?"
"I want to be a unicorn!"
"Awww, why's that?"........
"So I can stab people with my face."

Re: Click Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 8:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782727381
Scholar
18 posts
Actually Roosterus, Tserrina's staff isn't clickable. I've had it her staff since level 44. It is a proc and it started procing for me at level 45. Even with only 97 Dex it procs some but will continuously proc for me while i have Boon of the Garou on myself (+100 Dex is a big help). i went and trained 2HB up as far as i could for Tserrina's staff alone and with her staff i've gone from 75 to 107 in 2HB thus far.

Sorry was off-topic, felt the need to "clarify" (i am afterall a chanter =p)
▲ Page top
RE: Re: Click Effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2003 at 2:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250653639
33 posts
Off Topic is correct. Do not confuse the items.

Nightshade Scented Staff "IS" INDEED clickable.
It must be equipped and the casting time is 8.0

Guess i just got lucky as usual, no? Happened upon a 60 wizard selling this one and mage one, 1k ea he says so i run over, offer 900pp he takes it. huh, almost too easy, seeing as staff goes for 10k on our server all day, nicelt added to my lil lvl8 necro....dont scorn her shes got 189int, at your lvl she'll have 260 8)

I got this staff the other day, it wont click at 49. I am guessing its 51 like alot of the other high end staffs such as Tsrinna's. Pretty uber staff, takes up both hand slots though.

effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2002 at 1:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592756654380
140 posts
Scent of Darkness
Adding 9 Poison counters
Decrease Fire Resist from 24 (L39) to 27 (L44)
Decrease Poison Resist from 24 (L39) to 27 (L44)
Decrease Disease Resist from 24 (L39) to 27 (L44)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Nec (L39)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Alteration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: Poison + 25

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 150
Spell Duration: Unknown
Duration Formula: 9
Casting Time: 3.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds
Recast Delay: 6.0 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You smell the faint scent of darkness.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso is surrounded by a dark haze.
Spell fades: The scent of darkness fades.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

37 posts
Read my post from earlier...

Definately a clickable effect. Takes about 7 seconds to cast and no casting status bar... Seems to be the same with most items, spell takes longer to cast from item, then by casting a spell.

*shrug*

I like it. You're a lucky guy, Psywalker.
